title: lighter
lyrics: I'm reaching for something more than I can breathe, something more than I can breathe. Looking for this, this emotional crane. If your hate pushes through, I just don't know what to do. I'm, I'm losing my mind, mind, mind, pain, pain. I don't even know if I should remain the same. A broken connection in my membrane. Looking for this, this emotional crane. If your hate pushes through, girl, I just don't know what to do. When a dark side hits, you're not calling. My mind's at it's forethought, so I'm pawning. Wondering if fate steps and you're just stalling. Watery eyes and a stabbed line. Pressure, confusion, like a way of losing. Senses intoxicated, losing. Normal life, I just keep on losing. I ain't got brains, but choices I'm choosing. Next level love, underground hell. Number three, I'm not hit well. It's hit time to an inquisition bell. Make the most of what it's been. Then don't forget the way back when. Stop this train of pretend. My darling, I really think this is, this is the end. I'm, I'm losing my mind, mind, mind, pain, pain. I don't even know if I should remain the same. A broken connection in my membrane. Looking for this, this emotional crane. If your hate pushes through, I just don't know what to do. I'm, I'm losing my mind, mind, mind, pain, pain. I don't even know if I should remain the same. A broken connection in my membrane. Looking for this, this emotional crane. If your hate pushes through, I just don't know what to do. So the sun came up and you're still not calling. Scratching my mind clear of your pollen. Takes crying to mend and then derailing. Tattooed scars of lonely lives. Apprehension I'm missing, tiny lockets of kissing. Ends this brain cell of you. All crashing down to the ground in unison. Uncontrollable forces are bashing in. Uncontrollable forces are bashing in. Uncontrollable forces are bashing in. Uncontrollable forces are bashing in. Uncontrollable forces are bashing in. Uncontrollable forces are bashing in.  Now that I've opened for you, nothing's gonna be lost in you. Now that I've opened for you, nothing's gonna be lost in you. Now that I've opened for you, nothing's gonna be lost in you. I'm losing my mind, mind, mind, pain, pain. I don't even know if I should remain the same. A broken connection in my membrane. Looking for this, this emotional crane. If your hate pushes through, I just don't know what to do. I'm losing my mind, mind, mind, pain, pain. I don't even know if I should remain the same. A broken connection in my membrane. Looking for this, this emotional crane. If your hate pushes through, girl, I'm just done with you.

Pressure, confusion, like a way of losing. Senses intoxicated, losing.
Normal life, I just keep on losing. I ain't got brains, but choices I'm choosing.
Next level love, underground hell. Number three, I'm not hit well.
It's hit time to an inquisition bell. Make the most of what it's been.
Then don't forget the way back when. Stop this train of pretend.
